slide1.title:
Never Miss Your
Visa Renewal
slide1.description: Register your visa expiration date and get automatic reminders before it's too late

slide2.title: Easy Registration
slide2.description: Just enter your visa type and expiration date. No personal info (name, card number) is ever stored

slide3.title:
Push Notifications
Before Expiry
slide3.description: Get notified 4 months, 3 months, 1 month, and 2 weeks before expiration. Plenty of time to prepare

slide4.title:
Document Checklist
Included
slide4.description: Required document lists by visa type, plus application letter templates to get you started

slide5.title: Choose Your Language
slide5.description: Use the app in your preferred language
